steps.name: Environment preflight

steps.name: Staff notes: staff can create/list, applicant is denied
steps.evidence: Admin created staff_notes row bd347ea1-60ee-441a-a479-ca732d2fc618; visible to staff (count=1); applicant read returned 0 rows (expected 0).

steps.name: Campaigns: admin CRUD works, public read-only for active, non-staff write denied
steps.evidence: Admin created campaign c3544c9a-60ad-4487-b963-f5edc468b305; public select sees it=true; employer write denied=true; title intact=true.

steps.name: Employer subscription fields readable on employers row
Staff can SELECT all payments (monitoring policy)
steps.evidence: Applicant payment 9e77676f-2545-4fb3-bc35-1b020564a0ac: staff/admin select sees it=true; unrelated employer denied=true.

steps.name: Support conversation: employer opens thread, staff replies, unrelated employer denied
steps.evidence: Support thread aadbdf86-ee4c-4966-9e45-66bf144ac362 (kind=support, applicant_user_id=null); staff claim ok=true; staff reply ok=true; unrelated employer denied=true.

steps.name: Messaging read receipts + attachment_document_id round-trip
steps.evidence: Message dcfe1796-c665-4122-acc9-0bef437d234d is_read flipped false→true and visible to sender=true. Attachment message 8dc6238a-27b8-4d72-a169-8a00c136281a attachment_document_id=null (no document on file), visible unchanged to employer=true.

steps.name: Admin role assignment via POST /api/admin/users/:userId/role (service-role only, not directly callable by client)
steps.evidence: Direct client RPC call denied=true; POST /api/admin/users/:id/role as admin → 200; as applicant → 403 (expected 403).

steps.name: notify_email=false suppresses email dispatch (server honors user setting)
steps.evidence: notify_email=false → POST /api/comms/email responded 200 provider=skipped; notify_email=true → 200 provider=log.

steps.name: Results and evidence written
steps.evidence: Verification JSON and Markdown evidence were written.
